summary: 1 execution blocker and 0 unresolved plan-structure warnings: the pinned target base fails four required repository-wide gates outside this refactor's fixed scope. The amended plan is otherwise approved by Reality, Architecture, Quality, and Systems review.

blocking_issues.finding: The pinned base is red on four required repository-wide gates: 14 unrelated Composer contract violations, a stale JSONSink source hash, 14 unrelated Composer immutability findings, and a chat_solver trust-boundary fingerprint mismatch.
blocking_issues.resolution: Repair the failures in separately tracked work, require every Task 15 source-sensitive gate to pass on release/0.7.2, replace every BASE_SHA literal with that green commit, and rerun plan review before Task 0.

recommendations: Do not begin implementation from the currently pinned commit or widen this refactor to absorb the unrelated baseline repairs.
resolved_during_review: Pinned the work to release/0.7.2 and an immutable literal base SHA with fail-closed branch, worktree, and cleanliness checks.
Made the red repository baseline an explicit pre-Task-0 blocker rather than treating existing failures as waivers.
Made the private-module dependency matrix exhaustive, cycle-free, and consistent with the schema-versus-mutation boundary.
Assigned shared AWS-region validation to contracts.py so S3, Bedrock, and telemetry remain sibling domains.
Added complete recursive parser and 36-leaf dispatcher characterization, public-symbol identity checks, bounded input cases, stream contracts, and redacted failure envelopes.
Added AST-level preservation of moved test decorators and bodies, normalized parameter identity comparison, and independent moved-diff review.
Corrected receipt/approval and evidence/cleanup/ledger test ownership ranges and added the facade contract file to every identity-changing task.
Added publishable wheel-extra verification, focused and complete PostgreSQL testcontainer lanes, clean-context local container packaging smoke, and exact signed-commit CI acceptance.
Limited the runbook claim to byte-identical invocation compatibility and separated source acceptance from conditional live ECS release acceptance.
Made Judge registration worktree-local and key-free for agents, while confining authoritative HMAC verification and baseline generation to the operator shell.
Coupled source freeze, signed metadata, fingerprint regeneration, rollback, CI success, and closure of operator P0 elspeth-18fe6e759e.
Added rollback handling for partial signing, baseline-generation failure, post-signing gate failure, and post-commit rollback.
